# UserProfile <kbd>View</kbd>

> Flattened user profile for reporting dashboards.
> Backed by a SQL view joining User, Organization, and TeamMember.

**Defined in:** `showcase.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>showcase.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
view UserProfile {
    id               Int
    name             String
    email            String
    organizationName String
    teamCount        Int
}
```

</details>
